items.title: NHS Rations Bone Cement as Supply Gap Looms
items.description: A global bone cement supply fault could delay hip and knee replacements, with NHS stocks lasting just weeks. Press Association

items.title: Pharmacy Closures Threaten Community Care Shift
items.description: Two thirds of pharmacies in England are operating at a loss, raising fears of service cuts and further closures, the NPA has warned. Medscape News UK
